title: Alex's Fortunate Immersive Ores
description: Fortune enchantement works on Immersive Ores.
body:
This datapack adds fortune enchantement compatibilty to ores from [Immersive Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-ores).

Any pickaxe or paxel from [Immersive Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-ores) that has fortune enchantement of any level can now work on all of the 3 ores; Enderium, Vibranium and Vulpus ore from [Immersive Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-ores).
